utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , well Ross , what is this really about ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look , this is my home and I want to be able to come and go whenever I want !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , I will find someplace else to do the rest of my appointments . I just do not know what the big deal is !

emotion_cause.span: 4_I just do not know what the big deal is !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: The big deal is I do not want naked , greasy strangers in my apartment when I want to kick back with a puzzle ... beer ! Cold beer .
